# Anti-Counterfeit Solutions For Alcohol
## Q-ID®s ensure 100% unbreakable product and brand protection for alcoholic products
  * Impossible to copy, clone or fake
  * Authenticated in seconds
  * Simply integrated into existing manufacturing process
  * Empowering consumer-led authentication
  * Digital global track and trace
  * Empowering real-time global market and ESG data via smartphone authentication


### Request Further Information on our Q-ID® Solution 
## Combat Counterfeit Alcohol Products With Our Unbreakable Q-ID® Optical
Counterfeit alcohol is alcohol produced and manufactured in unlicensed distilleries or in homes. It can be packaged up to resemble large, recognisable brands, bringing many issues for both producers and consumers. Not only does counterfeit alcohol threaten the brand image of alcohol manufacturers and their revenues, it could also pose serious health consequences if consumed by the customer. 
According to the [Food Standards Agency](https://www.food.gov.uk/safety-hygiene/fake-alcohol), alcohol marked safe for consumption contains ethanol, whereas counterfeit products can contain other harmful chemicals, such as [antifreeze, screenwash and nail polish remover.](https://www.interpol.int/en/Crimes/Illicit-goods/Shop-safely/Unsafe-alcohol) These have been known to cause blindness, comas or worse. Currently, the most commonly counterfeited alcoholic product in the UK is vodka. In the EU alone, counterfeit wine and spirits cost the drinks industry €2.7bn in direct sales according to the European Union Intellectual Property Office ([EUIPO](https://www.euipo.europa.eu/en)). On a global scale, it is estimated that 30% of the alcohol produced worldwide is counterfeit or illicit.
[![Q-ID demonstration screenshot](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/demo-screenshot-1000.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s_dc9Img7-8)
The consumption of counterfeit alcohol has been rocketed since the Covid-19 pandemic, when online sales of alcoholic beverages globally increased 234%. In America alone, online sales of alcohol increased by [80%](https://www.forbes.com/sites/chrisfurnari/2020/12/01/online-alcohol-sales-surge-amid-coronavirus-pandemic/?sh=527bd6fa4f3a) in 2020. To help tackle the rise in counterfeit alcohol, we have created the world’s first quantum anti-counterfeit solution for alcohol.
## Q-ID® Optical – Providing Secure Anti-Counterfeiting For Alcohol
Many large alcohol manufacturing companies already utilise a certain level of anti-counterfeiting technology to protect their spirits. However, current solutions, such as QR codes or holograms, can still be copied, cloned or faked.
To stop counterfeiters in their tracks, we developed a brand-new, 100% unbreakable anti-counterfeit measure. Our [Q-ID® Optical tags](https://quantumbase.com/q-id-optical/) provide security at an atomic level, exploiting the inherent randomness of quantum materials to create a solution which cannot be replicated by alcohol counterfeiters. These unique identities (we call them Quantum Signatures) can be integrated easily into any existing manufacturing process, and once applied to bottles, packaging or otherwise, can be read by a standard smartphone camera.
This allows the process of authentication to take place in just a few seconds, far quicker than many other solutions. All you need to do to authenticate a product is download the Quantum Base app, which uses your smartphone camera to read the Q-ID® tag and provide all relevant product or brand information relating to your product. The whole process can be done by both employees and customers in real time, using integrated global track-and-trace data. We can provide an immediate Q-ID® solution at [packaging ](https://quantumbase.com/anti-counterfeit-packaging/)and product level, putting the power of authentication back in customer’s hands, and protecting buyers, brands, manufacturers and distributors from the dangers of counterfeit items.
[![alcohol anti-counterfeit protection graphic](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol.png)](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol.png)
## The Benefits Of Our Anti-Counterfeit Solution For The Alcohol Industry
### Get a quote or find out more information about our Q-ID® Optical solution
The UK economy loses around [£220 million](https://www.thedrinksbusiness.com/2018/06/the-uk-loses-218-million-every-year-from-counterfeit-wine-and-spirits/) each year due to counterfeit alcohol, such as beer, spirits and wine. This creates an obvious loss of revenue for verified manufacturers of alcoholic products. Alongside this, counterfeits which pose as verified manufacturers can cause damage to the [brand’s reputation](https://quantumbase.com/brand-protection/), especially if it negatively impacts the health of the consumer. Our anti-counterfeit solution can help to reduce this loss of income and positive brand associations for manufacturers whilst protecting the consumer. Alongside these, you can also enjoy:
  * Increased brand trust and growing consumer relations 
  * Global track and trace capabilities 
  * [Supply chain security](https://quantumbase.com/supply-chain-security/) and transparency at each stage 
  * Money saving opportunities from reducing the complexity of supply chains
  * Guaranteed quality assurance and manufacturing to UK and global standards 
  * Empower your customers through revolutionary protections


### **Get Started With Quantum Base**
If you would like to learn more about how our Q-ID® tags can provide reliable anti-counterfeiting for your company, [get in touch](https://quantumbase.com/quantum-base/contact/) with one of our team today.

<ul style="line-height: 1.6em; font-size: 18px;">

</div>
</section>
</div></section></div>
</div></div></div><!-- close content main div --></div></div><div id="av_section_2" class="avia-section av-2z864a4-bc04b0a6510ed220d079c8db8adfa9c9 main_color avia-section-no-padding avia-no-border-styling  avia-builder-el-7  el_after_av_one_full  el_before_av_section  avia-bg-style-scroll  container_wrap fullsize"><div class="container av-section-cont-open"><div class="template-page content  av-content-full alpha units"><div class="post-entry post-entry-type-page post-entry-7030"><div class="entry-content-wrapper clearfix">
<div class="flex_column av-2u1zvf0-6c6b965a7ad9aca75694d0e67a3db732 av_one_half  avia-builder-el-8  el_before_av_one_half  avia-builder-el-first  first flex_column_div av-zero-column-padding "><section class="av_textblock_section " itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork"><div class="avia_textblock  " itemprop="text"><p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Counterfeit alcohol is alcohol produced and manufactured in unlicensed distilleries or in homes. It can be packaged up to resemble large, recognisable brands, bringing many issues for both producers and consumers. Not only does counterfeit alcohol threaten the brand image of alcohol manufacturers and their revenues, it could also pose serious health consequences if consumed by the customer.  </span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">According to the <a href="https://www.food.gov.uk/safety-hygiene/fake-alcohol">Food Standards Agency</a></span>, alcohol marked safe for consumption contains ethanol, whereas counterfeit products can contain other harmful chemicals, such as <a style="font-weight: 400;" href="https://www.interpol.int/en/Crimes/Illicit-goods/Shop-safely/Unsafe-alcohol">antifreeze, screenwash and nail polish remover.</a> These have been known to cause blindness, comas or worse. Currently, the most commonly counterfeited alcoholic product in the UK is vodka. In the EU alone, counterfeit wine and spirits cost the drinks industry €2.7bn in direct sales according to the European Union Intellectual Property Office (<a href="https://www.euipo.europa.eu/en">EUIPO</a>). On a global scale, it is estimated that 30% of the alcohol produced worldwide is counterfeit or illicit.</p>
</div></section></div><div class="flex_column av-2u1zvf0-a7ed37641485ddc853b87269aa8650a2 av_one_half  avia-builder-el-10  el_after_av_one_half  el_before_av_textblock  flex_column_div av-zero-column-padding "><div class="avia-image-container av-3843hj-9e89b9b9c3d7c75306865be09c09069f av-styling- avia-align-center  avia-builder-el-11  avia-builder-el-no-sibling  " itemprop="image" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/ImageObject"><div class="avia-image-container-inner"><div class="avia-image-overlay-wrap"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s_dc9Img7-8" class="avia_image mfp-iframe lightbox-added"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="1000" height="582" class="wp-image-6804 avia-img-lazy-loading-not-6804 avia_image" src="https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/demo-screenshot-1000.jpg" alt="Q-ID demonstration screenshot" title="demo-screenshot-1000" itemprop="thumbnailUrl" srcset="https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/demo-screenshot-1000.jpg 1000w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/demo-screenshot-1000-300x175.jpg 300w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/demo-screenshot-1000-768x447.jpg 768w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/demo-screenshot-1000-705x410.jpg 705w" sizes="(max-width: 1000px) 100vw, 1000px"><span class="image-overlay overlay-type-video"><span class="image-overlay-inside"></span></span></a></div></div></div></div><section class="av_textblock_section " itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork"><div class="avia_textblock  " itemprop="text"><p>The consumption of counterfeit alcohol has been rocketed since the Covid-19 pandemic, when online sales of alcoholic beverages globally increased 234%. In America alone, online sales of alcohol increased by <a href="https://www.forbes.com/sites/chrisfurnari/2020/12/01/online-alcohol-sales-surge-amid-coronavirus-pandemic/?sh=527bd6fa4f3a">80%</a> in 2020. <span style="font-weight: 400;">To help tackle the rise in counterfeit alcohol, we have created the world’s first quantum anti-counterfeit solution for alcohol.</span></p>
</div></section>

However, current solutions, such as QR codes or holograms, can still be copied, cloned or faked.</span></p>
<p>To stop counterfeiters in their tracks, we developed a brand-new, 100% unbreakable anti-counterfeit measure. <span style="font-weight: 400;">Our </span><a href="https://quantumbase.com/q-id-optical/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Q-ID® Optical tags</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> provide security at an atomic level, exploiting the inherent randomness of quantum materials to create a solution which cannot be replicated by alcohol counterfeiters. These unique identities (we call them Quantum Signatures) can be integrated easily into any existing manufacturing process, and once applied to bottles, packaging or otherwise, can be read by a standard smartphone camera.</span></p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">This allows the process of authentication to take place in just a few seconds, far quicker than many other solutions. All you need to do to authenticate a product is download the Quantum Base app, which uses your smartphone camera to read the Q-ID® tag and provide all relevant product or brand information relating to your product. The whole process can be done by both employees and customers in real time, using integrated global track-and-trace data. We can provide an immediate Q-ID® solution at </span><a href="https://quantumbase.com/anti-counterfeit-packaging/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">packaging </span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;">and product level, putting the power of authentication back in customer’s hands, and protecting buyers, brands, manufacturers and distributors from the dangers of counterfeit items.</span></p>
</div></section></div><div class="flex_column av-40t6uf-fa730d3792c2225d38c3078ce1ba3221 av_one_half  avia-builder-el-19  el_after_av_one_half  el_before_av_hr  flex_column_div av-zero-column-padding "><div class="avia-image-container av-2balj24-96deb61cd88a1ebf540437ee99eb5dc7 av-styling- avia-align-center  avia-builder-el-20  avia-builder-el-no-sibling  " itemprop="image" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/ImageObject"><div class="avia-image-container-inner"><div class="avia-image-overlay-wrap"><a href="https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol.png" data-srcset="https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol.png 900w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol-277x300.png 277w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol-768x832.png 768w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol-651x705.png 651w" data-sizes="(max-width: 900px) 100vw, 900px" class="avia_image lightbox-added" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img decoding="async" width="900" height="975" class="wp-image-7946 avia-img-lazy-loading-not-7946 avia_image" src="https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol.png" alt="alcohol anti-counterfeit protection graphic" title="Alcohol" itemprop="thumbnailUrl" srcset="https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol.png 900w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol-277x300.png 277w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol-768x832.png 768w, https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Alcohol-651x705.png 651w" sizes="(max-width: 900px) 100vw, 900px"><span class="image-overlay overlay-type-image"><span class="image-overlay-inside"></span></span></a></div></div></div></div><div class="hr av-2kberq-b9c59562539f863cfa9fa230801b5841 hr-invisible  avia-builder-el-21  el_after_av_one_half  avia-builder-el-last  "><span class="hr-inner "><span class="hr-inner-style"></span></span></div>

<section class="av_tab_section"><div aria-controls="tab-id-1-content" role="tab" tabindex="0" data-fake-id="#tab-id-1" class="tab active_tab fullsize-tab" aria-hidden="false">How we use cookies</div>
<div id="tab-id-1-content" class="tab_content active_tab_content" aria-hidden="false" style="min-height: 1px;">
<div class="tab_inner_content invers-color">
<p>We may request cookies to be set on your device. We use cookies to let us know when you visit our websites, how you interact with us, to enrich your user experience, and to customize your relationship with our website. </p>
<p>Click on the different category headings to find out more. You can also change some of your preferences. Note that blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience on our websites and the services we are able to offer.</p>

<div id="tab-id-2-content" class="tab_content " aria-hidden="false" style="min-height: 1px;">
<div class="tab_inner_content invers-color">
<p>These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our website and to use some of its features.</p>
<p>Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the website, refuseing them will have impact how our site functions. You always can block or delete cookies by changing your browser settings and force blocking all cookies on this website. But this will always prompt you to accept/refuse cookies when revisiting our site.</p>
<p>We fully respect if you want to refuse cookies but to avoid asking you again and again kindly allow us to store a cookie for that. You are free to opt out any time or opt in for other cookies to get a better experience. If you refuse cookies we will remove all set cookies in our domain.</p>
<p>We provide you with a list of stored cookies on your computer in our domain so you can check what we stored. Due to security reasons we are not able to show or modify cookies from other domains. You can check these in your browser security settings.</p>

We need 2 cookies to store this setting. Otherwise you will be prompted again when opening a new browser window or new a tab.</span></label></div>

<div class="tab_inner_content invers-color">
<p>We also use different external services like Google Webfonts, Google Maps, and external Video providers.
